name: FIBRA Macquarie Mexico
summary: FIBRA Macquarie M√É¬©xico (FIBRA Macquarie) (BMV:FIBRAMQ) is a real estate investment trust (fideicomiso de inversi√É¬≥n en bienes ra√É¬≠ces), or FIBRA, listed on the Mexican Stock Exchange (Bolsa Mexicana de Valores) targeting industrial, retail and office real estate opportunities in Mexico, with a primary focus on stabilized income-producing properties. FIBRA Macquarie's portfolio consists of 236 industrial properties and 17 retail properties, located in 20 cities across 16 Mexican states as of December 31, 2020. Nine of the retail properties are held through a 50/50 joint venture.
